blockers.rootCause: Ledger plugin introduced axios dependency copies; audit normalizer reported high advisories before axios override/lockfile refresh.
blockers.remediation: Pin axios override to 1.17.0 and verify npm-audit criticalHighUnresolved=0.
Move public config to schemaVersion 2.0 with semantic network mainnet and hardhatNetwork ethereumMainnet; operator address fields remain null placeholders.
Normalize secret trigger prefilter to lower case and add private-operator regression harness.
Load optional Ledger address from ignored local environment and configure ledgerAccounts on Mainnet Hardhat networks.
Move release compiler profile from solc 0.8.35 to solc 0.8.28.

claimBoundary: Repository-controlled defect register only; no protected deployment evidence or Mainnet transaction claim.
